div.div:
未登录处理
1. 引导登录后返回支付页
2. 保留已选商品信息
3. 登录失效时避免直接丢单

switch.text: 未登录处理1. 引导登录后返回支付页...

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 350px; height: 1px; padding-top: 295px; margin-left: 440px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
支付前异常处理
1. 商品下架 / 套餐失效
2. 价格变更 / 优惠失效
3. 库存不足 / 限购超限
4. 用户无购买资格 / 重复购买限制
5. 已存在未支付订单时，提示继续支付或重建订单

switch.text: 支付前异常处理1. 商品下架 / 套餐失效...

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 350px; height: 1px; padding-top: 535px; margin-left: 440px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
订单创建异常处理
1. 参数校验失败：直接提示并阻止下单
2. 接口超时 / 系统异常：提示稍后重试
3. 创建成功但前端未收到结果：需要通过幂等号或订单查询避免重复下单

switch.text: 订单创建异常处理1. 参数校验失败：直接提示并阻止下单...

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 350px; height: 1px; padding-top: 775px; margin-left: 440px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
预支付异常处理
1. 微信统一下单失败 / 渠道报错
2. 支付配置异常 / 商户号问题
3. 订单金额不一致，必须阻断支付
4. 生成失败时允许重新发起，但不得重复创建多笔有效订单

switch.text: 预支付异常处理1. 微信统一下单失败 / 渠道报错...

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 350px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1015px; margin-left: 440px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
支付中异常处理
1. 用户取消支付：保留待支付订单，支持继续支付
2. 网络中断 / 小程序切后台：回到订单详情继续查询状态
3. 收银台返回失败：提示重试，不直接认定未支付
4. 不依赖客户端结果，最终以服务端支付状态为准

switch.text: 支付中异常处理1. 用户取消支付：保留待支付订单，支持继续支付...

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 350px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1285px; margin-left: 440px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
支付结果确认异常处理
1. 回调延迟 / 丢失：主动轮询支付单状态
2. 重复回调：服务端必须幂等更新
3. 长时间未支付：自动关单，释放库存/名额/优惠占用
4. 状态未知时提示“支付结果确认中”，避免误导用户

switch.text: 支付结果确认异常处理1. 回调延迟 / 丢失：主动轮询支付单状态...

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 350px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1545px; margin-left: 440px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
支付后异常处理
1. 支付成功但权益发放失败：进入补偿队列
2. 订单状态已支付但业务未生效：支持人工修复 / 自动补发
3. 补偿仍失败：触发告警并生成人工处理工单
4. 必要时走退款流程，避免用户已扣款但无权益

switch.text: 支付后异常处理1. 支付成功但权益发放失败：进入补偿队列...

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 168px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1685px; margin-left: 11px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
异常兜底
支付成功但发放失败
进入补偿/人工处理/退款流程

switch.text: 异常兜底支付成功但发放失败进入补偿/人工处理/退款流程...
